requirements.task_name: Favorite 2 free outdoor events for ages 5–8 within 10 miles this Saturday
requirements.task_description: Find outdoor events happening on the upcoming Saturday, filter to free events suitable for ages 5–8 within 10 miles, and add the first two results to your favorites list.

requirements.task_name: Plan a full Sunday with 3 events (morning indoor under $20, afternoon park, evening show under $50)
requirements.task_description: Use filters to plan a full day for Sunday by adding exactly three events to a day plan: one indoor event before noon costing $20 or less, one afternoon park event, and one evening show costing $50 or less.

requirements.task_name: Register two children for the cheapest Saturday morning workshop for ages 10–12 under $40 next month
requirements.task_description: Find workshops scheduled next month for ages 10–12 on Saturday mornings, filter to options under $40 per ticket, select the cheapest one, and complete a registration form for 2 spots.

requirements.task_name: Choose the best family membership under $150 with the most included free events and add it to cart
requirements.task_description: Compare family membership options under $150, identify the membership plan that includes the highest number of free events, and add that plan to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Save 3 weekly weekday classes for ages 3–4 after 4 PM within 5 miles to a watchlist
requirements.task_description: Find recurring weekly classes for 3–4-year-olds that take place on weekdays after 4 PM within 5 miles, and add the first three matching classes to a watchlist.

requirements.task_name: Add 2 nearby events (playground and storytime) within 2 miles of a specific neighborhood to your day plan using the map view
requirements.task_description: Using the map view, focus on a specific neighborhood, find one playground-type event and one storytime event within 2 miles of that area, and add both events to your day plan.

requirements.task_name: Favorite 2 holiday events (free daytime parade with free parking and evening lights display under $25) between Dec 20–24
requirements.task_description: Within the date range Dec 20–24, find one daytime holiday parade tagged with free parking and one evening holiday lights display with tickets under $25, then add both events to your favorites.

requirements.task_name: Save 2 highly rated sensory-friendly indoor events for this weekend to a favorites list
requirements.task_description: Find indoor sensory-friendly events for this upcoming weekend that are stroller-friendly and have ratings of at least 4.5 stars, then add the first two matching events to your favorites list.
